item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.5 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * feat: improve description of eject disk plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/62 * chore: update plugins version by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/63 * chore: update plugin version to 1.0.3 by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/64
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.4...v1.0.5
